channel.title: Netskope — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Netskope (netskope).

item.title: CVE-2026-2810 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Endpoint DLP Driver Out-of-Bounds Read
item.description: Netskope was notified about a potential gap in the Endpoint DLP Module for Netskope Client on Windows systems. The successful exploitation of the gap can potentially allow an unprivileged user to trigger an out-of-bounds read within a driver, leading…

item.title: CVE-2026-2809 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Endpoint DLP Driver DLL
item.description: Netskope was notified about a potential gap in its Endpoint DLP Module for Netskope Client on Windows systems. The successful exploitation of the gap can potentially allow a privileged user to trigger an integer overflow within the DLL Injector, lead…

item.title: CVE-2025-15584 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Endpoint DLP Driver Filter Communication Port Integer Overflow
item.description: Netskope was notified about a potential gap in its Endpoint DLP Module for Netskope Client on Windows systems. The successful exploitation of the gap can potentially allow an unprivileged user to trigger an integer overflow within the filter communic…

item.title: CVE-2025-11156 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Improper Service Loading Vulnerability in Netskope Endpoint DLP Driver
item.description: Netskope was notified about a potential gap in its agent (NS Client) on Windows systems. If this gap is successfully exploited, a local, authenticated user with Administrator privileges can improperly load the driver as a generic kernel service. This…

item.title: CVE-2025-5942 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Heap Overflow in Netskope Endpoint DLP Driver
item.description: Netskope was notified about a potential gap in its agent (NS Client) on Windows systems. If this gap is successfully exploited, an unprivileged user can trigger a heap overflow in the epdlpdrv.sys driver, leading to a Blue-Screen-of-Death (BSOD). Suc…

item.title: CVE-2025-0309 · 6 MEDIUM — Netskope Client Local Elevation of Privileges
item.description: An insufficient validation on the server connection endpoint in Netskope Client allows local users to elevate privileges on the system. The insufficient validation allows Netskope Client to connect to any other server with Public Signed CA TLS certif…

item.title: CVE-2025-5941 · 2 LOW — Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability in Netskope Client
item.description: Netskope is notified about a potential gap in its agent (NS Client) in which a malicious actor could trigger a memory leak by sending a crafted DNS packet to a machine. A successful exploitation may require administrative privileges on the machine, b…

item.title: CVE-2024-7402 · 7 HIGH — Netskope Client Configuration Tampering with Local MITM
item.description: Netskope has identified a potential gap in its agent (Netskope Client) in which a malicious insider can potentially tamper the Netskope Client configuration by performing MITM (Man-in-the-Middle) activity on the Netskope Client communication channel.…

item.title: CVE-2024-13177 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Symlink Following in Netskope Client Postinstall Script
item.description: Netskope Client on Mac OS is impacted by a vulnerability in which the postinstall script does not properly validate the path of the file “nsinstallation”. A standard user could potentially create a symlink of the file “nsinstallation” to escalate the…

item.title: CVE-2024-11616 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Double-fetch heap overflow
item.description: Netskope was made aware of a security vulnerability in Netskope Endpoint DLP’s Content Control Driver where a double-fetch issue leads to heap overflow. The vulnerability arises from the fact that the NumberOfBytes argument to ExAllocatePoolWithTag,…

item.title: CVE-2024-7401 · 8.5 HIGH — Client Enrollment Process Bypass
item.description: Netskope was notified about a security gap in Netskope Client enrollment process where NSClient is using a static token “Orgkey” as authentication parameter. Since this is a static token, if leaked, cannot be rotated or revoked. A malicious actor can…

item.title: CVE-2023-4996 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Local privilege escalation
item.description: Netskope was made aware of a security vulnerability in its NSClient product for version 100 & prior where a malicious non-admin user can disable the Netskope client by using a specially-crafted package. The root cause of the problem was a user contro…

item.title: CVE-2022-4149 · 7 HIGH — Local privilege escalation using log file
item.description: The Netskope client service (prior to R96) on Windows runs as NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM which writes log files to a writable directory (C:\Users\Public\netSkope) for a standard user. The files are created and written with a SYSTEM account except one file (…

item.title: CVE-2023-2270 · 7 HIGH — Local privilege escalation
item.description: The Netskope client service running with NT\SYSTEM privileges accepts network connections from localhost to start various services and execute commands. The connection handling function of Netskope client before R100 in this service utilized a relati…

item.title: CVE-2021-44862 · 8.4 HIGH — Sensitive Information store in NSClient logs
item.description: Netskope client is impacted by a vulnerability where an authenticated, local attacker can view sensitive information stored in NSClient logs which should be restricted. The vulnerability exists because the sensitive information is not masked/scrubbed…
